series_metadata.series_description: Bingo license application and compliance files allow the office to track and monitor charity bingo organizations to ensure compliance with ORC 2915. Records may include, but are not limited to, name and address of applicants, statements from charitable organization on longevity, days and time BINGO will be conducted, copy of rental agreements, previous history, copy of IRS determination letter, charitable use of net profits and other documents relevant to the application process. A copy of any site inspection reports, temporary permits, communication related to application deficiencies shall also be kept.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain 5 years from close date. ; Paper: Retain 5 years from close date. If scanned and saved electronically, destroy., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
